title: Extra Select Marrowbone Rolls Dog Treat - Crunchy Biscuits & Snacks with Meaty Center - Marrow Bone Puppy Treats & Bedtime Biscuits for Dogs - 1 Litre Resealable Tub (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Your dog will love the crunchy texture of these marrowbone dog biscuits treats making them ideal as puppy training treats.
From small dog biscuits for tiny pups to large dog treats for big dogs, these marrowbone dog biscuits are bite-sized and suitable for all.
These tasty minis dog treats feature a rich, meaty marrow bone wrapped in a crunchy biscuit - perfect as dog treats for large dogs and small breeds alike.
These mini dog treats are perfect as puppy biscuits, dog bedtime biscuits, small dog treats for training, or simply as a delicious treat.
These dog biscuits small dog breeds & large love come in a handy tub that's perfect for keeping hungry pets satisfied with fresh mini dog biscuits.
description: Indications Crude Protein 10.6% - Crude Fat 5.5% - Crude Ash 3.5% - Crude Fibre 2.8% - Sodium 0.5% Ingredients Cereals, Glucose 9.4%, Palm Oil, Chicken Meal, Minerals Directions Small Dog: 2-4 per day. Medium Dog: 5-7 per day. Large Dog: 8-10 per day. These are an approximate daily requirement for an adult dog. Remember your dog's appetite wikll vary according to lifestyle, age, and condition, so you may need to adjust the quantities accordingly. To be given as a reward alongside your daily feeding. Always provide your dog with fresh drinking water. This product contains traces of nuts and is not suitable for human consumption. See more

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎Store in a cool, dry place. Once opened, keep sealed for freshness.
